steps.title: Use the password example
steps.content: The example says "iloveyou" was the eighth most commonly used password. That supports a blank meaning widespread or commonly adopted, especially because the passage contrasts expert advice with what users actually do.

steps.title: Reject mismatched adjectives
steps.content: A suggests originality, C contradicts the easy-to-remember example, and D is too vague to capture how many people use the approach. The answer is B.
